title: Causal Decoders & Cross-Attention
code:
import numpy as np

def apply_causal_mask(scores):
    seq_len = scores.shape[-1]
    mask = np.tril(np.ones((seq_len, seq_len))) == 0
    scores[mask] = -1e9
    return scores

def run_practice():
    scores = np.zeros((3, 3))
    masked = apply_causal_mask(scores)
    assert masked[0, 1] == -1e9
    assert masked[1, 0] == 0.0
    print('[PASS] Causal mask boundaries verified.')

if __name__ == '__main__':
    run_practice()
